name_en: Genuine leather Fendi Mon Tresor small bucket bag, fabric material, fully decorated with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, adorned with transparent sequins. Lined interior with silver-finished metal hardware. Two detachable shoulder straps, one long and one short, can be worn crossbody or over the shoulder.
name_cn:
Genuine leather Fendi Mon Tresor small bucket bag, fabric material, fully decorated with FF pattern jacquard embroidery, adorned with transparent sequins. Lined interior with silver-finished metal hardware. Two detachable shoulder straps, one long and one short, can be worn crossbody or over the shoulder.
Size 12*18*10cm
